title: FX Transfer — Dual Amount Entry (UR-011, FR-019)

steps.given: The user has a EUR account ('Savings EUR') and a USD account ('US Wallet')
steps.when: The user starts a Transfer from 'Savings EUR' to 'US Wallet'
steps.then: The UI displays two amount fields: one labeled 'EUR' (source) and one labeled 'USD' (destination)

steps.given: The FX Transfer screen is open with source EUR and target USD
steps.when: The user tries to save without entering the USD amount
steps.then: Validation error is shown; the transfer is not saved

steps.given: The FX Transfer screen is open
steps.when: The user enters 1000 EUR and 1100 USD and saves
steps.then: Two linked transaction rows are created: debit leg (1000, EUR, 'Savings EUR') and credit leg (1100, USD, 'US Wallet'), sharing a transfer_linked_id

steps.given: The user has two accounts with the SAME currency (both EUR)
steps.when: The user starts a Transfer between them
steps.then: Only ONE amount field is shown (standard transfer behavior, no FX mode)
